default_read_transactions.name: query
default_read_transactions.purpose: Execute a declared DSL or typed plan with explicit result semantics and continuation.

default_read_transactions.name: read
default_read_transactions.purpose: Read any stable archive ref through a declared projection/view.

default_read_transactions.name: get
default_read_transactions.purpose: Resolve one exact object identity when a generic read would add ambiguity.

default_read_transactions.name: graph
default_read_transactions.purpose: Traverse lineage/topology with an explicit recursive continuation contract.

default_read_transactions.name: explain
default_read_transactions.purpose: Discover grammar, fields, values, plans, authority, and recovery routes.

default_read_transactions.name: context
default_read_transactions.purpose: Compile and retrieve policy-gated bounded context plus receipts.

default_read_transactions.name: status
default_read_transactions.purpose: Read archive, source, embedding, coordination, and operation status.

privileged_transactions.name: write
privileged_transactions.purpose: Apply a declaration-owned mutation after shared authorization.

privileged_transactions.name: judge
privileged_transactions.purpose: Accept, reject, defer, or supersede candidates without collapsing candidate state.

privileged_transactions.name: run
privileged_transactions.purpose: Execute a saved query or governed recipe ref.

privileged_transactions.name: maintenance
privileged_transactions.purpose: Preview, authorize, execute, inspect, and reconcile maintenance operations.
